rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one assumption but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
